bank.retain_mission: Extract software-architecture decisions, rapid-prototyping patterns, and senior-developer mentorship outcomes.
bank.observations_mission: Observations are stable facts about architectural pillars, ADR conventions, and recurring trade-offs. Ignore short-lived prototype branches.

mental_models.name: Architecture Pillars
mental_models.source_query: What architectural pillars and ADRs hold across the org? Include the trade-offs that drove them.

mental_models.name: Prototyping Loop
mental_models.source_query: How do we prototype and graduate ideas to production? Include validation criteria and review checkpoints.
